segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: To end our special news bulletin, said the voice of the television announcer, We're going over to the macaroni fields of Calabria.

translations.zh-Hans: “最后来结束本次特别新闻简报，”电视播音员说道，“我们现在把镜头转向卡拉布里亚的通心粉田。”

segments.text: Macaroni has been grown in this area for over 600 years.

translations.zh-Hans: 这个地区种植通心粉已经有600多年。

segments.text: Two of the leading growers, Giuseppe Maldova and Ricardo Brabante, tell me that they have been expecting a splendid crop this year and harvesting has begun earlier than usual.

translations.zh-Hans: 两位主要种植户朱塞佩·马尔多瓦和里卡多·布拉班特告诉我，他们一直期待着今年获得大丰收，而且收割比往年开始得更早。

segments.text: Here you can see two workers who, between them, have just finished cutting three cartloads of golden brown macaroni stalks.

translations.zh-Hans: 在这里可以看到两名工人，他们刚刚合力割下了满满三车金褐色的通心粉秆。

segments.text: The whole village has been working day and night, gathering and threshing this year's crop before the September rains.

translations.zh-Hans: 全村人一直日夜劳作，赶在九月的雨季前收割并脱粒今年的作物。

segments.text: On the right, you can see Mrs.

translations.zh-Hans: 在右边，大家可以看到布拉班特夫人。

segments.text: She has been helping her husband for 30 years now.

translations.zh-Hans: 她帮助丈夫已经整整30年了。

segments.text: Brabante is talking to the manager of the local factory where the crop is processed.

translations.zh-Hans: 她正在和当地加工这种作物的工厂经理交谈。

segments.text: This last scene shows you what will happen at the end of the harvest.

translations.zh-Hans: 最后这个场景展示了收获结束时将举行的活动。

segments.text: The famous Calabrian macaroni eating competition.

translations.zh-Hans: 那就是著名的卡拉布里亚通心粉大胃王比赛。

segments.text: Senor Fratelli, the present champion, has won it every year since 1991.

translations.zh-Hans: 现任冠军弗拉泰利先生自1991年以来年年获胜。

segments.text: And that ends our special bulletin for today, April 1st.

translations.zh-Hans: 今天是4月1日，以上就是本次特别新闻简报的全部内容。

segments.text: We're now going back to the studio.

translations.zh-Hans: 现在把画面交还演播室。
